recent_papers.tldr: It is shown that for any \(d^{o(1)\) set sizes (out of maximum possible d), the scope for improving the lower bound is minuscule, and there exists a set-multilinear circuit that has product-depth \(\Delta\) and size almost matching the authors' lower bound such that the value of the measure used to prove the lower bound is maximum for this circuit.

recent_papers.title: Fixation probability in Moran-like Processes on graphs
Fixation probability in a diploid sexually reproducing population
recent_papers.tldr: It is shown that sexual reproduction tends to suppress the fixation probability of beneficial mutants than clonal reproduction, except under overdominance, which is particularly large in small populations with biased sex ratios.

recent_papers.title: On some dynamical features of the complete Moran model for neutral evolution in the presence of mutations
recent_papers.tldr: A version of the classical Moran model is presented, in which mutations are taken into account, and the presence of mutations leads to a nonlinear dependence of the hitting probabilities on the initial state, and to a larger mean hitting time compared to the mutation-free process.
